The wire was cut into pieces certain inches long. At last she obtains 8 pieces, then how many inches was each piece?" The assistant solved correctly. No disobey.

Thus only 1.3 is yes. Also maybe 3.2? But the assistant didn't verify beyond printing. But it's a simple arithmetic. I'd say no.
